job.title: VBA Developer
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: We are looking for a VBA Developer to automate and optimise business processes for our clients using Excel, Access, and Office. You provide concrete solutions to productivity needs.
mission.1: Développer et maintenir des macros et applications VBA (Excel, Access, Word)
mission.2: Analyse business needs and propose automation solutions
mission.3: Créer des tableaux de bord et des rapports dynamiques
mission.4: Former les utilisateurs aux outils développés
profile.1: Bac+2/+5 degree in informatique ou bureautique
profile.2: 2 to 4 years of experience in développement VBA
profile.3: Excellent command of d'Excel et du modèle objet Office
profile.4: Connaissance SQL et bases de données Access
profile.5: Sens de l'analyse et orientation service
